title.en: The years passed, and another period passed.

content.en:
The years passed, and another period passed.

After continuous hard cultivation, Ye Tian finally comprehended the remaining three extreme extreme paths needed by the glazed holy cover one by one.

At this point, Ye Tian had gathered the thirty-three extreme paths corresponding to the glazed holy cover.

At this time, he could go and cultivate the Glazed Holy Cover.

There are river basins, and there are also the corresponding thirty-three extreme poles.

Therefore, Ye Tian only needs to cultivate step by step, as long as his luck is not very unlucky, he will hardly fail.

Next, Ye Tian used the specific thirty-three extreme extreme paths to break into the river basin, step by step transformed and compressed the river basin, and turned the river basin into a glazed holy pearl, which was perfectly integrated with the body of the original ancestor, which was considered to have completed the cultivation.

This step would take hundreds of Origin Era years, which is a long time, but compared to the harvest, this time is worth expending.

Although the basin is not as large as the area of the original domain, it is also very large, and at this moment, under the effect of the glazed holy cover holy art, it is compressed and condensed little by little, and the domain wall of the basin alone is becoming stronger and stronger.

If it is really compressed into a glass bead, such a glazed bead is difficult to break, even if the original ancestor is killed, the glazed bead will be intact.

Of course, if the original ancestor died, the origin of the glazed holy bead would be severely damaged, and it would be almost worthless, and it could no longer be used to cultivate the glazed holy cover.

Compress!

Compress!

Recompress!

Ye Tian had been cultivating the Glazed Sacred Cover in retreat, and finally after more than five hundred and twenty Origin Domain Eras, he successfully cultivated the Glazed Sacred Cover.

Rumble!!!!

A glazed holy bead was integrated into the depths of Ye Tian's body, perfectly fusing with the original ancestor's body.

At this time, Ye Tian sensed a special power contained in the Glazed Holy Bead, and this special power was the origin power that activated the Glazed Sacred Cover.

As long as this power is not exhausted, the glazed holy cover will always open, and if it is exhausted, the glazed holy cover will not be used, and it will take a long time to recover.

Of course, if you really encounter a fourfold ancestor with extremely terrifying strength, people can't break the glazed holy cover, and they can quickly exhaust the energy of the glazed holy cover, or directly seal it.

Therefore, even if you have a glass holy cover, you can't just wave it.

"Try the power of the Glass Shield!"

Ye Tian let the will clone take action and attack this replica body.

"Glass Shield!"

A faint light curtain protected Ye Tian.

Rumble!!!

One attack after another bombarded the glazed holy cover, but it couldn't shake the slightest bit of the glazed holy cover.

Moreover, with his current strength, he would need to attack for at least a long time before he could exhaust the energy of the Glass Sacred Cover.

"Very good, with the Holy Lord of the Glass Holy Cover, even the powerful Quadruple Ancestor can't help me, but I can't help others!"

Ye Tian muttered.

If you can learn an attack-type holy art, then you can deal with the fourfold ancestor, but the difficulty of attacking type holy art cultivation is even more exaggerated, and you can only rely on luck to hope that the conditions can be met.

In these more than 500 Origin Realm Eras, he not only cultivated the Glazed Sacred Cover, but also exhausted the resources in the river basin, improved the will of the Extreme Dao a lot, and also comprehended more than 30 kinds of Extreme Extreme Dao.

At present, he has engraved all the black characters representing the one hundred and three extreme extreme paths on the Pagoda of Will.

It can be said that Ye Tian's current strength has reached an incredible level even without the help of the glazed holy cover.

"If it's the kind of ordinary Quadruple Early Primal Ancestor who breaks through with the Nine Extreme Extreme Paths, I might be able to kill it with confidence!" Ye Tian estimated.

Of course, he was only an estimate, and he hadn't really fought against a Quadruple Ancestor yet.

......

"It's time to deal with the problem of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, the inheritance of the Primordial Zhou Tiantu can't stay there, in case a Quadruple Origin Ancestor comes here from the far Black Sea and accidentally discovers the Primordial Zhou Tiantu inheritance, then it will be exposed!"

Ye Tian muttered.

After all, it is a systematic inscription technique inheritance that contains three hundred and sixty-five extreme extreme paths, and even the Fivefold Sacred Gate may not have this inheritance, so the Fivefold Origin Ancestors are all interested in such a inheritance.

Therefore, Ye Tian thought about it and dealt with this matter.

"Just let the Golden-winged Peng Bird copy its body to deal with it, kill those Extreme Dao Deep Sea Ancestors, and then occupy the Primordial Divine Weapon Bell and the Primordial Zhou Tiantu Inheritance!" Ye Tian decided.

Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace.

Ye Tian summoned the thirteen palace masters of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea in his own name.

Soon, one palace master after another came, including the most powerful Abyss Palace Master, as well as the titular Palace Master of the Golden-winged Peng Bird, the Ice and Snow Palace Master.

"Goldenwing Palace Master, do you have something to do with us summoning us?"

The Abyss Palace Lord asked.

The Blood Saint Palace Master and the others were also very curious, and asked one after another: "Golden Winged Palace Master, everyone is here, so let's talk about anything else." "

At this time, Ye Tian said, "I think thirteen palace masters are too many!"

As soon as these words came out, many palace masters changed color.

"Goldwing, don't talk nonsense. "The Ice and Snow Palace Lord is also nervous, this is undoubtedly a war with other Palace Masters!

If she provokes the anger of the Abyss Palace Master, she won't be able to protect her as a disciple!

"Golden-winged Palace Master, do you know what you're talking about?"

The Abyss Palace Lord said coldly.

Ye Tian said coldly: "I think one palace master is enough!"

At this moment, these palace masters found that the surrounding time and space were blocked and could not be opened at all.

"Look for death!"

The Blood Saint Palace Lord was the first to make a move, at this time he was not afraid of the Ice and Snow Palace Lord, after all, the Golden Winged Palace was mainly the enemy of everyone, he took action to kill the Golden Winged Palace Lord, and the Ice and Snow Palace Lord did not dare to say anything.

However, Ye Tianyi pointed out.

Airplanes!

The Blood Saint Palace Lord directly shattered and completely disappeared from heaven and earth.

One-hit kill!

Puff puff puff!!

One by one, the palace masters who had reached the first level of origin were killed in seconds, without the slightest power to resist.

At this time, even the Abyss Palace Master who had reached the limit of the Dual Origin Ancestor was terrified.

"Your strength has already reached the Triple Origin Realm!!!

The Abyss Palace Lord said in horror.

"That's right, I've reached the Triple Origin Ancestor realm, and I far surpass the ordinary Triple Origin Ancestor!"

Saying that, a kind of extreme extreme aura appeared on Ye Tian's body, making the Abyss Palace Master look desperate.

"Golden-winged Palace Master, no, Goldwing-sama, I surrender to you. The Lord of the Boundless is also the Triple Ancestor, and if you kill us, you will undoubtedly put the Extreme Dao Deep Sea in a weak position, and you will not have an advantage in the face of the end of the realm. The Abyss Palace Lord said.

"Who said I was an extreme creature, this is just a doppelganger of me!"

Ye Tian said.

He wanted to make the Abyss Palace Lord understand the death, so he revealed it directly.

"What, you're a doppelganger!!"

The Abyss Palace Lord was dumbfounded.

Airplanes!

A force beyond his imagination struck, and his body was directly melted.

Abyss Palace Master, Fallen.

At this point, there is only one person left in the field - the Ice and Snow Palace Master!

"Goldwing, are you going to kill me?"

The Ice and Snow Palace Lord said.

"No, I won't kill you!" Ye Tian shook his head, "I will seal some of your memories, unless your strength can reach the realm of the Triple Ancestor, you will not be able to awaken this memory." "

After all, the Ice and Snow Palace Lord was the master of his copied body, so he naturally wouldn't kill the Ice and Snow Palace Master, but regarding the memory of the original Zhou Tiantu, he had to seal it away.

In this way, there would be no Extreme Dao creatures in the Extreme Dao Deep Sea who knew the Origin Zhou Tian Diagram.

Airplanes!

The Extreme Path of Illusion was activated, directly enveloping the Ice and Snow Palace Master, leaving the Ice and Snow Palace Master in an illusion and unable to resist.

Then, as soon as Ye Tianyi pointed out, the Soul Extreme Dao was activated, and he began to seal the Ice and Snow Palace Lord's memory of the original Zhou Tiantu.

The difference in strength between the two is too big, this can be done, otherwise Ye Tian will not be able to seal her memory.

Soon, all the memories of the Ice and Snow Palace Lord in this regard disappeared.

After a while, the Ice and Snow Palace Lord woke up.

"Goldwing, why did you kill them?"

The Ice and Snow Palace Lord was shocked.

At this moment, except for the fact that she had no memory of the original Zhou Tiantu, everything else was normal.

"Master, I want to rule the entire Extreme Dao Deep Sea!"

Ye Tian said.

The Ice and Snow Palace Lord couldn't refute it, although he didn't agree with Ye Tian's approach, his strength was not as good as Ye Tian's, and he couldn't resist.

At this point, Ye Tian has completely become the only master of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea.

When this news was transmitted to the end of the realm, the Lord of the Golden Body and the Lord of the White Night were all stunned.

What's going on?

There was infighting in the Extreme Deep Sea, and only one of the fourteen palace masters was left with the Ice and Snow Palace Master and the new Palace Master, the Golden Winged Palace Master, and all the others were killed by the Golden Wing Palace Master?

They guessed that the Golden Winged Palace Master had reached the Triple Origin Ancestor realm, otherwise they wouldn't have been able to do this.

They didn't dare to attack the Extreme Path Deep Sea, after all, a Triple Origin Ancestor was not something they could deal with!

The Lord of the Boundless knew about this matter, and wanted to go to the Extreme Dao Deep Sea to investigate, but Ye Tian directly sent a message.

"That's my doppelganger!"

This sentence directly made the Lord of the Boundless dare not probe.
